title: Psychology (English) Program Instructional Objectives
content:
Psychology (English) Program Instructional Objectives

IO1- To offer a program in which academic-clinical education and training are combined.

IO2- To provide education and training opportunities with research, application and laboratory based in Behavioral Sciences and Health fields.

IO3- To provide an education and training approach that can integrate traditional therapy basis with contemporary psychological perspectives.

IO4- To develop an education and training approach aimed at achieving international standards in order to create a multidisciplinary and interdisciplinary culture.

IO5- In line with these purposes, to offer employment opportunities as psychologists, researchers, consultants and managers in private and public institutions and organizations such as schools, universities, hospitals, retirement homes, prisons, etc.
